token_standards.sql: SELECT 'erc20' AS standard, count(*) AS deployments FROM tokens.erc20 WHERE blockchain='ethereum' UNION ALL SELECT standard, count(*) FROM tokens.nft WHERE blockchain='ethereum' GROUP BY standard

erc4337_totals.sql: SELECT count(*) AS userops, count(distinct sender) AS smart_accounts, count(distinct bundler) AS bundlers FROM account_abstraction_erc4337.userops WHERE blockchain='ethereum'

erc4337_by_year.sql: SELECT date_trunc('year', block_time) AS yr, count(*) AS userops, count(distinct sender) AS active_accounts FROM account_abstraction_erc4337.userops WHERE blockchain='ethereum' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
